description: GM Apparel socks will provide you with the most support possible while doing your yoga, the socks are cushioned on the bottom and in the heel area and include non-slip nubs. The GM Apparel ribbed cuffs also guarantee a proper fit for all of your exercises. Barre socks from GM Apparel offer additional grip for improved stability & balance, ensuring your safety. Increased friction between the socks and the ground may result from the silicone gel grips on the bottom. The Kid's Trainer Sports Socks include additional heel protection and are constructed of 65% Cotton, 30% Polyester, and 5% Elastane. Non-slip socks now have an extended lifespan even after several uses and washings thanks to the addition of strong elastic fibre. To allow you to personalize your look, gripper sole socks are available in packs of three in either black or assorted colours. Including four sizes UK: 6 to 8.5, 9 to 12, 12.5 to 13.5, and 4-6. For indoor exercises like gymnastics, jumping, trampolining, etc. sports performance trainer liner socks with additional gripper soles are ideal. Offers complete foot protection and guarantees comfort throughout prolonged workouts. Features: • Comfortable • Easy to Wear • Non-Slip • Breathable & Skin-Friendly • Anti-Skid Gels • Typical Heel • Available in Different Colours • Different Sizes
